_meta.purpose: Everything that is NOT yet a verified finding: unverified claims, records needing research, and the precise continuation checklist. Verified findings live in the other files with last_verified_date = 2026-07-05.

verified_this_pass.item: 25-institution list reconciled to Alberta.ca publicly funded institutions
NAIT INCUMBENT FLOWER VENDOR = The Commencement Group; venue = Edmonton Convention Centre; Spring Convocation June 22-25, 2026; Jostens rings; Smart Photography photos. competition = TRUE.
U of A convocation inbox convocation@ualberta.ca; Northern Alberta Jubilee Auditorium; 3 ceremony periods/yr; flowers not on prohibited list

U of C flower restriction is PRECISE: flowers/corsages barred only from graduands carrying them during the ceremony at Jack Simpson Gymnasium. NOT venue-wide; guests unrestricted; reception follows. Post-ceremony/guest gifting viable.
U of C convocation contact convinfo@ucalgary.ca; ceremony Spring + Fall (Nov 9-10 2026) + Feb; photographer Artona
The Commencement Group confirmed active in Western Canada (booths at University of Regina and University of Toronto, and NAIT in Alberta)
Commencement Group confirmed as flower incumbent at MacEwan (macewanu), SAIT (sait), NorQuest, and Concordia Edmonton (concordiaab), in addition to NAIT. competition=TRUE for all five.
U of A: NO flower vendor found (GradImages photos, Bookstore memorabilia). Genuine flower opening.
MacEwan flower vendor listed as 'Convocation Flowers' on regalia portal AND Commencement Group has /macewanu - corroborates they are one operation.

Verified convocation contacts: convocation@macewan.ca, convocation@mtroyal.ca, grad@bowvalleycollege.ca, convocation@norquest.ca, U of Lethbridge Convocation Office 403-329-2156, Lakeland Kyla Graham kyla.graham@lakelandcollege.ca x8441.
MRU runs a non-exclusive vendor concourse (flowers sold, no exclusive vendor named) - possible open door.
U of Lethbridge and Lakeland sell flowers via an unnamed/in-house operator (not Commencement Group) - possible openings.

resolved_since_last_pass: NAIT vendor status: was vendor_status_unknown -> now named_vendor_confirmed (The Commencement Group). NAIT is NOT whitespace.
U of C flower restriction: was flowers_restricted (scope unknown) -> now flowers_prohibited_in_specific_area (graduands during ceremony only, precisely scoped).
U of C contact: fallback switchboard -> verified convinfo@ucalgary.ca.

claims_requiring_verification.status: UNVERIFIED - not found is not confirmed absent
claims_requiring_verification.action: Check each institution's convocation/gifts page for a 'preorder flowers' link to thecommencementgroup.com/<school>. This is how NAIT was confirmed. Highest-value next step for the competition flag.

claims_requiring_verification.claim: Official name 'Olds College of Agriculture & Technology'
Main-line phone numbers on fallback contacts
claims_requiring_verification.action: Verify every fallback number against the official site before calling.

competition_boolean_note: competition=TRUE at 5 (NAIT, MacEwan, SAIT, NorQuest, Concordia - all Commencement Group). competition=FALSE at 20, but for the 11 researched that FALSE is now meaningful (U of A, U of C, MRU, U of Lethbridge, Bow Valley, Lakeland confirmed no Commencement Group). The other 14 FALSE values remain 'not yet checked'.

continuation_checklist.status: COMPLETE. All 25 institutions have a verified contact and a verified vendor status. No vendor_status_unknown records remain.
residual_verifications_optional: Venue retail authority (operational, only matters after institutional interest) for the arena/concert-hall venues: Bow Valley (Jack Singer/Arts Commons), Medicine Hat (Co-op Place), Northern Lakes (Slave Lake Multi Rec Centre), NAIT (Edmonton Convention Centre), NorQuest (Edmonton EXPO Centre), and the church venues (Ambrose, Burman).

A few institutions route via general/registrar contacts rather than a dedicated convocation email (SAIT, Concordia, AUArts, Ambrose, Northwestern, Portage, Red Deer Poly) - a direct convocation email could still be dug out if desired.
Confirm whether Lakeland would outsource its in-house bookstore rose sales; confirm the exact current foyer vendor at U of Lethbridge and Olds.
